sources.filters: measured height, or num_floors × 3m; unknown-height footprints excluded

sources.source: CelesTrak — GPS YUMA almanac (US Space Force / NAVCEN)
sources.license: GPS almanac data is a product of the US Space Force / NAVCEN — US federal government work, public domain. Redistributed by CelesTrak (https://celestrak.org/), which permits use with attribution.

sources.note: Representative East Bay fire-season afternoon (14:00 PDT) over the Grizzly Peak AO.
sources.propagation: IS-GPS-200 almanac algorithm (no harmonic corrections); az/el at the AO reference position
